title: Terms of Service
intro: This page outlines the rules and terms governing your use of the MNMKNK platform. Please read them carefully.
s1Content: By using the MNMKNK platform, you agree to abide by the terms of service outlined here.
s2Content: The information provided when creating an account must be accurate and complete. You are responsible for keeping your account information confidential.
s3Content: It is prohibited to use the platform for any illegal purposes or to violate the intellectual property rights of others.
